nav.exit_confirm_message: This will securely clear all session data and return you to the home page. Do you wish to proceed?

welcome.subtext: Your identity is protected by multi-layered blockchain encryption. Please prepare your Cédula de Identidad y Electoral to begin the validation process.

footer.mission: Global leader in blockchain-based democratic infrastructure and digital governance.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Junta Central Electoral. All rights reserved. Blockchain Verified System.

identity.title: Identity Verification
identity.subtext: Please enter your 11-digit Cédula number as it appears on your physical document. This information is encrypted immediately.

sidebar.security_text: Your information is protected by Sovereign-grade end-to-end encryption. Data is processed locally and never stored in a readable format.

verifying.title: Verifying your identity...
verifying.subtitle: Establishing a secure connection with the National Identity Registry. This ensures your vote remains private and tamper-proof.

biometric.title: Biometric Verification
biometric.subtitle: Secure your digital identity by providing a quick biometric scan. Powered by Didit Protocol.
biometric.instruction: Please click the button below to launch the secure environment. You may be asked for camera permissions.
biometric.syncing_subtext: We are validating your identity with the Civil Registry. Please stay on this page.

success.title: Identity Authenticated
success.subtitle: Your digital credential has been securely issued and synchronized with the VoteChain Blockchain Node. You are now authorized to cast your encrypted ballot.

ballot.subtitle_president: Select a candidate to represent the executive branch. Your selection is locally encrypted before transmission.
ballot.subtitle_review: Please verify your selections across all categories before final submission.
ballot.warning_review_bold: Once submitted, your vote cannot be changed.

election.select_subtitle: You may vote in each active election independently. Select one to begin.
election.no_active: No active elections at this time.
election.independent_note: You may vote in each listed election independently within the same period.

descriptions.PRESIDENTIAL: Choose the President of the Republic

review.title: Review Your Ballot
review.immutable_bold: Once confirmed, your vote cannot be changed.
review.crypto_wait: Please wait. This happens once per session.
review.crypto_ready_sub: Your vote will be signed and sealed to the blockchain.

vote_success.subtitle: Your civic contribution has been permanently anchored to the distributed ledger. This record is immutable and verifiable.
vote_success.pending_subtitle: Select an election below to continue your voting session.
vote_success.receipt_note: This receipt is your proof of participation.
vote_success.session_terminated: Your session has been securely terminated. This receipt is your proof of participation.

footer.label: Official Voting System | Secured by Blockchain

post_vote.all_complete_subtitle: You have successfully cast your vote in all available elections for this period. Your civic duty is fulfilled.
post_vote.confirm_message: This will securely clear all session data and return you to the home page. You will need to re-verify your identity to vote again.

overview_identity.title: Process Overview
overview_identity.content: The digital voting process begins with identity validation. This step is crucial to ensure each citizen casts only one vote and to guarantee the integrity of the electoral roll.

overview_ballot.title: Process Overview
overview_ballot.content: Once verified, you enter the selection stage. Here you can choose your candidates privately. Your choice will be encrypted on your device before being sent to the blockchain network.

identity.title: Verification Tips
identity.content:
To ensure a seamless biometric validation, please follow these recommendations:

  • Use your original physical Cédula (no copies or photos).
  • Find a location with frontal natural light (avoid backlighting).
  • Keep your face uncovered and centered in the viewfinder.
  • Avoid glare or reflections on the document's surface.

voting.title: Voting Instructions
voting.content:
During the selection process, please keep in mind:

  • Review your choices in the Final Summary before confirming.
  • On the Municipal ballot, you must elect an Alcalde and can mark one or more Regidores.
  • Note: Once submitted, the vote is cryptographically signed and cannot be modified.

security.title: Security and Privacy
security.content:
Your privacy is our absolute priority:

  • Secret Ballot: Your identity is separated from your vote using Zero-Knowledge (ZK) protocols.
  • Integrity: Blockchain technology prevents any attempt at post-casting alteration.
  • Encryption: We use 256-bit AES standards to protect all data transmissions.

troubleshooting_identity.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting_identity.content:
If you encounter technical difficulties with the camera or identity:

  • Camera Error? Check your browser's site permissions.
  • Identity Error? Clean your camera lens and your document's chip area.
  • Session Expired? Restart the process from the beginning.

troubleshooting_ballot.title: Technical Help
troubleshooting_ballot.content:
If you experience issues during voting:

  • Ballot not loading? Refresh the page; your identity is already verified.
  • Submission error? Check your internet connection.
  • Session Expired? For security, voting sessions have a time limit.
